Bash(git -C D:/Claude/ozvps commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix admin auth to use Auth0 app_metadata instead of hardcoded email list

Admin status is now checked via Auth0''s app_metadata.is_admin field using
the Management API, instead of a hardcoded ADMIN_EMAILS array.

The login flow now:
1. Verifies Auth0 credentials first \(gets auth0UserId\)
2. Checks Auth0''s app_metadata.is_admin via API
3. Validates 2FA

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C D:/Claude/ozvps commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Remove database dependency for admin login - use Auth0 only

Admin login no longer requires a user_mappings record. All user data
\(email, name, admin status\) comes directly from Auth0. Only 2FA secrets
still come from the database \(since TOTP is custom, not Auth0 MFA\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C D:/Claude/ozvps commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''

- Use namespace import for otplib to fix bundler compatibility

- Add better logging for debugging

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
